entries.name: layout(xaxis_title)
entries.desc: X轴标题, 例: fig.update_layout(xaxis_title='Frequency (GHz)')

entries.name: layout(yaxis_title)
entries.desc: Y轴标题, 例: fig.update_layout(yaxis_title='dB')

entries.name: layout(template)
entries.desc: 模板: 'plotly_white'|'plotly_dark'|'ggplot2'|'seaborn'|'simple_white'

entries.name: layout(hovermode)
entries.desc: 悬浮模式: 'closest'|'x'|'y'|'x unified'|False

entries.name: layout(legend)
entries.desc: 图例: fig.update_layout(legend=dict(orientation='h',y=-0.2,x=0.5))

entries.name: ❌→✅ update_xaxis
entries.desc: ❌ fig.update_xaxis(type='log') → ✅ fig.update_layout(xaxis_type='log')
entries.sig: 没有 update_xaxis 方法, 用 update_xaxes(复数) 或 update_layout(xaxis_type=)

entries.name: ❌→✅ update_yaxis
entries.desc: ❌ fig.update_yaxis(title='dB') → ✅ fig.update_layout(yaxis_title='dB')

entries.name: ❌→✅ s_db索引
entries.desc: ❌ ntwk.s_db[1,0] → ✅ ntwk.s_db[:,1,0]
entries.sig: s_db 是 3D 数组，必须用 [:, m, n]

entries.name: ❌→✅ cascade
entries.desc: ❌ ntwk1.cascade(ntwk2) → ✅ ntwk1 ** ntwk2
entries.sig: skrf 用 ** 运算符级联

entries.name: ❌→✅ slice
entries.desc: ❌ ntwk.slice(2e9,4e9) → ✅ ntwk['2-4ghz']
entries.sig: 切片用 ntwk['start-stop'] 格式，支持 GHz/MHz/kHz 后缀
